skills.name: x-setup
skills.does: Checks plugin install state, cache, symlinks, and prompt visibility.
skills.when: Setup, update, or skill discoverability looks wrong.
skills.prompt: Use x-setup to check whether the plugin is installed and visible.
skills.output: Install state, prompt visibility, issues, and one next command.

skills.name: x-router
skills.does: Chooses the best method or workflow skill.
skills.when: The request is broad, messy, or spans several method families.
skills.prompt: Use x-router on this messy startup idea.
skills.output: Primary skill, supporting skills, specialist boundaries, why, and a ready-to-use follow-up prompt.

skills.name: x-review-pack
skills.does: Runs routing, method review, compound candidates, and handoff closeout.
skills.when: A plan needs a complete close-the-loop review.
skills.artifact: Route, review, compound candidates, and handoff decision
skills.prompt: Use x-review-pack on this launch plan and close the loop.
skills.output: Bounded route, primary review, specialist and stop-condition checks, reusable lesson candidates, and handoff status.

skills.name: x-purpose
skills.does: Tests usefulness, ambition, originality, and sustained effort.
skills.when: Choosing projects, missions, product bets, or career bets.
skills.prompt: Use x-purpose on this product bet before I spend a month on it.
skills.output: Usefulness, originality, future value, effort price, and a pursue-or-stop decision.

skills.name: x-thinking
skills.does: Improves reasoning through facts, direct sources, first principles, limits, and updates.
skills.when: Strategy, architecture, impossible claims, expensive claims, or inherited assumptions.
skills.prompt: Use x-thinking on this architecture claim: this must be realtime.
skills.output: Facts, sources, assumptions, first-principles rebuild, constraints, and uncertainty.

skills.name: x-engineering
skills.does: Finds engineering leverage using ideal limits, cost structure, integration, and product taste.
skills.when: Technical strategy, build-vs-buy, architecture, cost, design, or engineering leadership.
skills.prompt: Use x-engineering on this build-vs-buy decision.
skills.output: Theoretical ideal, cost leverage, integration risks, engineering value, and recommendation.

skills.name: x-5-step-algo
skills.does: Questions, deletes, simplifies, accelerates, then automates.
skills.when: Feature specs, workflows, migrations, refactors, automations, or operations.
skills.prompt: Use x-5-step-algo on this feature spec.
skills.output: Question, delete, simplify, accelerate, automate sequence with an add-back trigger.

skills.name: x-teams
skills.does: Reviews talent, ownership, builder culture, feedback, and fair people-process boundaries.
skills.when: Hiring, founding teams, performance, team health, or consequential people decisions.
skills.prompt: Use x-teams on this founding team plan.
skills.output: Job-relevant evidence, system factors, feedback, protected-process checks, and human approvals.

skills.name: x-org
skills.does: Removes organizational drag while preserving controls that protect real risks.
skills.when: Meetings, approvals, cross-team work, communication, or unclear ownership.
skills.prompt: Use x-org on this approval-heavy workflow.
skills.output: Direct communication path, justified controls, stale process, owner map, and simpler language.

skills.name: x-urgency
skills.does: Shortens timelines and feedback loops after direction and safety boundaries are valid.
skills.when: Launches, blocked projects, roadmaps, migrations, or crisis work.
skills.prompt: Use x-urgency on this slipping launch.
skills.output: Critical path, parallel work, review cadence, scoreboard, stop conditions, and next moves.

skills.name: x-manufacturing
skills.does: Treats production and delivery as the product and attacks the throughput constraint.
skills.when: Operations, CI/CD, support, fulfillment, data pipelines, or physical production.
skills.prompt: Use x-manufacturing on this weekly reporting pipeline.
skills.output: Production path, constraint, throughput, quality, cost, and dependency bottlenecks.

skills.name: x-founder
skills.does: Tests conviction, responsibility, runway, protected constraints, and commitment level.
skills.when: Startup commitment, pivots, runway, leadership, or hard personal bets.
skills.prompt: Use x-founder on whether I should commit to this startup.
skills.output: Conviction, protected constraints, runway, staged options, maximum loss, and stop conditions.

skills.name: x-company-building
skills.does: Turns mission into prototype, proof, survival, sequence, trust, and scale.
skills.when: Startup roadmaps, product strategy, capital allocation, launches, or customer trust.
skills.prompt: Use x-company-building on this first product roadmap.
skills.output: Prototype proof, sequence, allies, survival constraints, trust, and public reality check.

skills.name: x-future
skills.does: Applies abundance, emerging possibility, AI, robotics, autonomy, interfaces, and energy lenses.
skills.when: Long-term technology bets, future-state planning, automation, robotics, or energy ideas.
skills.prompt: Use x-future on this robotics and AI opportunity.
skills.output: Abundance, emerging capability, autonomy, energy, human-machine, and transition lenses.

skills.name: x-risk
skills.does: Reviews systemic downside, affected parties, controls, release gates, and stop conditions.
skills.when: AI systems, safety, infrastructure, policy, compliance, or plans with broad downside.
skills.prompt: Use x-risk on this AI agent release.
skills.output: Downside map, affected parties, independent review, release gates, stop conditions, and a proceed-or-stop decision.

skills.name: x-multiplanetary
skills.does: Turns moonshots into staged capability thresholds, gateway proofs, and resilience milestones.
skills.when: Deep-tech, resilient systems, infrastructure, or long-horizon missions.
skills.prompt: Use x-multiplanetary on this moonshot infrastructure plan.
skills.output: Staged milestones, gateway proofs, mission metric, resilience value, and next proof.

skills.name: x-reading
skills.does: Builds source-labeled reading paths by problem type and learning goal.
skills.when: Learning engineering, rockets, history, AI, strategy, science, economics, or worldview.
skills.prompt: Use x-reading to build a learning list for hard-tech company building.
skills.output: Books by problem type, why each helps, source basis, attribution strength, and reading sequence.

skills.name: x-compound
skills.does: Saves explicitly authorized lessons and reviews as local Markdown memory.
skills.when: A completed method session produced learning that should guide future work.
skills.prompt: Use x-compound to save the reusable lesson from this review.
skills.output: Candidate notes, duplicate check, authorization state, and saved Markdown path.

skills.name: x-memory-refresh
skills.does: Audits local lessons and reviews for stale, duplicate, unsafe, or weakly retrievable memory.
skills.when: Saved method memory has accumulated and needs pruning or reconciliation.
skills.artifact: Memory audit with proposed or authorized edits
skills.prompt: Use x-memory-refresh on this repo's docs/lessons and docs/reviews.
skills.output: Folders checked, notes reviewed, duplicate and stale findings, authorization state, and edits.

skills.name: x-handoff
skills.does: Writes a compact redacted continuation handoff.
skills.when: Long reviews, context transitions, or next-session briefs need exact continuation state.
skills.prompt: Use x-handoff to write a continuation note for this strategy review.
skills.output: Redacted state, decisions, verification, next steps, risks, and suggested next skills.
